prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A handsome young man named Fang Yichen in traditional Chinese ink painting style. Extremely attractive with delicate refined features, clear pale skin, and outstanding scholarly temperament. Deep penetrating eyes that reflect sharp intelligence, clean-cut handsome face with precise bone structure. Slender graceful physique wearing an elegant blue-green changshan robe in Ming Dynasty style. Hair styled in traditional scholarly fashion with a topknot. Holding a folding fan in one hand, standing with quiet dignified posture. Slightly pale complexion suggesting indoor scholarly life. Gentle yet perceptive expression showing both wisdom and melancholy. Full-body character design, centered standing pose against pure white background. Traditional Chinese ink wash painting style with black, white and gray tones, artistic and atmospheric. No text, no symbols, no words., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: ink_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
